summary: P1 BUGFIX SESSION VALIDATED - Support Tickets bugs fixed. Bug A (Thread disappears after admin sends message): FIXED. Bug B (Admin receives notification for own message): FIXED. All regression tests pass.

bug_a_thread_disappears.description: Thread disappears after admin sends message
bug_a_thread_disappears.root_cause: refreshSelectedTicket was fetching from list view endpoint (no messages)
bug_a_thread_disappears.fix: Now fetches from /admin/tickets/{id} first to get full ticket details with messages
bug_a_thread_disappears.frontend_test: PASS - Messages before send: 5, after send: 6. Thread stays visible.
bug_a_thread_disappears.backend_test: PASS - Single ticket endpoint returns full messages array

bug_b_admin_self_notification.description: Admin receives notification for own ticket message
bug_b_admin_self_notification.root_cause: Notification count query used updated_at timestamp
bug_b_admin_self_notification.fix: Added last_client_message_at field that ONLY updates for client messages
bug_b_admin_self_notification.backend_test: PASS - notification counts endpoint works correctly
bug_b_admin_self_notification.code_verification: PASS - add_message only sets last_client_message_at for is_staff=False

regression_tests.open_ticket_displays_messages: PASS - Messages visible in detail panel
regression_tests.search_tickets: PASS - Search by client email works
regression_tests.filter_by_status: PASS - OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED filters work
regression_tests.status_change_actions: PASS - Mark In Progress, Mark Resolved work
regression_tests.ticket_switching: PASS - Switching between tickets shows correct messages

critical_code_review_comments: Support.js refreshSelectedTicket correctly fetches /admin/tickets/{id} first before syncing list
ticket_service.py add_message correctly tracks last_client_message_at only for client messages (is_staff=False)
notifications.py get_tickets_new correctly uses last_client_message_at instead of updated_at
Code architecture properly separates list view (optimized, no full messages) from detail view (full messages)
seed_data_creation: Test messages were sent during validation (TEST_BUG_VALIDATION_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 bugfix session complete. Two bugs in support tickets were fixed: 1) Thread no longer disappears after admin sends message - now fetches full ticket details first. 2) Admin no longer receives notification badge for own messages - uses last_client_message_at field. Test file test_ticket_bugfixes.py covers both fixes.

bug_a.symptom: Thread/chat panel disappeared after admin sent a message
bug_a.root_cause: refreshSelectedTicket() was calling the list endpoint which returns tickets without full messages array. After updating state, selectedTicket lost its messages data.
bug_a.fix: Changed refreshSelectedTicket to first fetch /admin/tickets/{id} to get full ticket details including messages, then background sync the list separately.

bug_b.symptom: Admin notification badge incremented when admin sent message to a ticket
bug_b.root_cause: The notification count query used updated_at field to find new activity. When admin sent message, updated_at changed, incorrectly counting it as new activity requiring admin attention.
bug_b.fix: Added new field last_client_message_at that ONLY updates when is_staff=False. Notification query now uses this field instead of updated_at.
